## Summary
- Introduce canonical SLAE grounding status model for revise pipeline decisions.
- Enforce fail-closed candidate handling when explicit A/B/C prose is missing or malformed.
- Enforce fail-closed evidence mismatch behavior in Revise Workbench.
- Harden phase alias matching using normalized boundary logic.
- Fix Pass 1A quarantine short-name allowlist overfire (`"ari"`) that caused a CI regression.

## Scope
- Revision grounding contracts (`lib/revision/slae.ts`, `lib/revision/opportunityLedger.ts`, `lib/revision/workbenchQueue.ts`).
- Admin phase alias matching hardening (`lib/admin/phaseAliasMatch.ts`, admin API routes).
- Quarantine allowlist precision fix for legitimate short canonical names (`lib/evaluation/pipeline/pass1aQuarantine.ts`).
- Regression tests for contamination and alias matching.

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)
Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies
- Primary risk: short-name allowlist growth can over-admit noise if expanded too broadly.
- Mitigation: keep heuristic strict, apply minimal allowlist delta (`ari` only), and retain pronoun-family regression test coverage.
- Known anomaly disclosure: none newly introduced by this patch set.

## Latency Impact
- No new runtime loops or network calls added.
- Matcher hardening is constant-time string normalization and boundary checks.
- Quarantine fix is a single allowlist token addition.

## Key Changes
- Added `lib/revision/slae.ts` for canonical grounding statuses:
  - `supported`
  - `supported_after_relook`
  - `uncertain_after_relook_reportable`
  - `uncertain_after_relook_blocked`
  - `unsupported_blocked`
- Updated `lib/revision/opportunityLedger.ts`:
  - `explicitCandidateOrFallback` now fails closed (returns empty) when explicit prose is absent/invalid.
  - longform extraction paths no longer persist backend-generated fallback prose as executable A/B/C text.
  - adds grounding metadata (`grounding_status`, `grounding_note`) to opportunities.
- Updated `lib/revision/workbenchQueue.ts`:
  - unresolved evidence mismatch is now fail-closed (`uncertain_after_relook_blocked`) instead of preserving bad evidence.
  - carries grounding metadata into workbench opportunities.
- Added shared phase alias helper `lib/admin/phaseAliasMatch.ts` and wired into:
  - `app/api/admin/costs/evaluations/route.ts`
  - `app/api/admin/pipeline-health/route.ts`
- Added tests:
  - `__tests__/lib/revision/opportunityLedger.test.ts` (fail-closed + contamination regression)
  - `tests/lib/admin/phaseAliasMatch.test.ts`

## Evaluation Process Change Declaration
Process Change: yes

- [x] Sequential phase-gate doctrine preserved (parallelism only within safe sub-workloads).
- [x] Phase 0 remains first and is proven before downstream processing.
- [x] Phase 2 remains blocked on accepted_story_ledger_v1 (Review Gate authority).
- [x] Phase 3 remains blocked on pass12_handoff_v1 and is sole owner of Pass 3B synthesis.
- [x] Deterministic quality gates run after Pass 3B and before completion.
- [x] WAVE remains post-evaluation (after evaluation_result_v2) and non-fatal to base evaluation.

One-line doctrine: The pipeline is sequential at the phase/gate level and parallel only inside safe sub-workloads.

Process-Change Impact Summary (required when Process Change: yes):
- Fail-closed revise grounding behavior is enforced without changing canonical phase ownership or gate ordering.

## Contract Integrity
- Canonical SLAE statuses are centralized and reused; no non-canonical status values were introduced.
- Fail-closed behavior is explicit where evidence/candidate validity is unresolved.
- No illegal state-transition masking was added; errors remain explicit.

## Behavioral Quality
- Behavior remains fail-closed under missing/invalid revise candidate prose.
- Behavior remains fail-closed when evidence mismatch cannot be reconciled.
- Pronoun-family warning guardrail regression is restored by preserving valid short-name character extraction.

- This PR focuses on enforceable fail-closed behavior and regression protection for contamination-sensitive revise paths.
